problem_text_cn: 对流层大气缓慢上升时与周围热传递可略，空气含4/5氮分子、1/5氧分子。1. 地面温度27°C、压强1atm，求10km高度处温度；2. 1m²截面积人造卫星在10km高度沿圆轨道运行，估算初始大气阻力大小。
problem_text_en: Heat transfer between the tropospheric atmosphere and the surrounding environment is negligible when it rises slowly. Air contains 4/5 nitrogen molecules and 1/5 oxygen molecules. 1. The ground temperature is 27°C and pressure is 1atm，find the temperature at an altitude of 10km；2. An artificial satellite with a cross-sectional area of 1m² orbits in a circular orbit at an altitude of 10km，estimate the initial atmospheric resistance force.
problem_solution_cn: （1）10km高度温度：- 绝热过程，平均摩尔质量μ=28.8×10⁻³kg/mol，γ=7/5，温度分布T=T₀-[(γ-1)/γ](μgz/R)，代入得T≈203K（-70°C）。（2）大气阻力估算：- 卫星速度v≈√(gR₀)≈7.92×10³m/s，分子平均速率远小于v，阻力F=2nmv²S，代入数据得F≈5.5×10⁷N。
problem_solution_en: （1）Temperature at 10km altitude：- Adiabatic process，average molar mass μ=28.8×10⁻³kg/mol，γ=7/5，temperature distribution T=T₀-[(γ-1)/γ](μgz/R)，substituting gives T≈203K（-70°C）。（2）Estimation of atmospheric resistance：- Satellite velocity v≈√(gR₀)≈7.92×10³m/s，the average molecular speed is much smaller than v，resistance F=2nmv²S，substituting data gives F≈5.5×10⁷N。
problem_answer: 1. 10km高度温度$T≈203	ext{K}（-70^\circext{C}）$；2. 初始大气阻力$F≈5.5×10^7	ext{N}$
